title: Kernel lane 1 / planning. In /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration, map all readiness/peripheral/backup shell scripts that currently use ad-hoc exit codes or provider-unavailable handling. Focus on scripts under scripts/ likely adjacent to check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh and run-kernel-task-...
summary_text: Mapped candidate scripts (readiness/peripheral/backup) are: 1. [scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh) 2. [scripts/check-peripheral-adapters.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-peripheral-adapters.sh) 3. [scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh) 4. [scripts/sim-kernel-peripherals.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/sim-kernel-peripherals.sh) 5. [scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh) 6. [scripts/local/bootstrap-kernel-task-completion-backup-agent.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/bootstrap-kernel-task-completion-backup-agent.sh) Current exit-code behavior (ad-hoc and/or provider-unavailable paths): 1. [check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh) - `fail()` exits `1` for generic failures. - `block_provider_unavailable()` exits `${EX_TEMPFAIL}` (`75`) and logs a `provider_unavailable` block. - Provider-unavailable detection is explicit in execute-live smoke (`is_provider_unavailable_error` + stderr grep for “Service unavailable”). - `notebooklm_resolve_bin` failure in required live mode exits `1`. - Live smoke off/path skip uses normal non-failure flow. 2. [check-peripheral-adapters.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-peripheral-adapters.sh) - Every hard failure uses `fail()` and exits `1`. - No provider-unavailable-specific handling found. 3. [check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh) - Provider-unavailable/strict path handling is mostly collapsed to `exit 1`: - strict bridge missing in required mode → `exit 1` - `node` missing in required mode → `exit 1` - `run_provider_probe()` failures loop then `exit 1` - Runtime wrapper `run_with_timeout()` can return `124` (timeout), `127`, or `128+signal`, but both `/vote` and `/kernel` smoke callers convert any non-zero smoke rc into `exit 1`. - Repo-test failures inherit script exit behavior via `set -e` (non-zero). 4. [sim-kernel-peripherals.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/sim-kernel-peripherals.sh) - `require_cmd` and `require_dir` exit `2`. - unknown arg / invalid issue-number / parser failures exit `2`. - run/help and contract summary branches use `0` on success. - `write_summary` exits `1` if any failed checks. - No provider-unavailable-specific branch; this script treats missing external deps as hard command/format failures (`2`). 5. [run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh) - Uses symbolic constants: - `EX_USAGE=64`, `EX_SOFTWARE=70`, `EX_TEMPFAIL=75`. - Missing env/deps: - missing python3 or guard source → `70` - missing required explicit args in record mode → `64` - unknown option → `64` - Lock contention in record mode returns `75` with BLOCKED marker. - scan mode lock contention returns `0` (silent no-op). - final `python3 -m ...` return code is passed through. 6. [bootstrap-kernel-task-completion-backup-agent.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/bootstrap-kernel-task-completion-backup-agent.sh) - `--help`/dry-run flows exit `0`. - invalid arg or non-executable runner exits `2`. - default path writes plist and runs `launchctl`; those command exits are currently not normalized (raw values propagate). Minimal rollout order (low risk → high risk): 1. [check-peripheral-adapters.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-peripheral-adapters.sh) 2. [check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh) (small, isolated, already has explicit temp-fail path) 3. [ru...
